installCommand: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='apps/next/package.json';const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));for(const key of ['dependencies','devDependencies']){if(!j[key]) continue;for(const dep of Object.keys(j[key])){if(String(j[key][dep]).startsWith('workspace:')) delete j[key][dep];}}fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(j,null,2));" && npm --prefix apps/next install
